## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you want.

## Problem or Use Case

What problem would this solve? Who benefits from it?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the change you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you considered.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, mockups, examples, or related links if helpful.
